_meta.about: AWARA 33x6 audio: full Suno-style audio generation prompts, one per lens per ascension step. Genre + instruments per tradition; dynamics, BPM and structure per step (1 fizika -> 6 bozhestvennoe). Companion to lens_level_prompts.json (same slugs and level keys).
_meta.note: Front skips keys starting with underscore. Each value is a ready style prompt for Suno/Udio. The arc stays meditative and deep throughout; epic and cosmic feeling comes from depth, scale, sub-bass and reverb - NOT from fast tempo or major key. Pair with the audio file paths in lens_level_prompts.json (audio field).

vedic.1: Hindustani sacred raga devotional; instruments: sitar, tanpura, bansuri, tabla, mantra chant; raw earthbound opening - a single low drone, near silence, dim and bodily, slow and heavy; 48 BPM, minor low drone; ritual and sacred, atmospheric, high fidelity.
vedic.2: Hindustani sacred raga devotional; instruments: sitar, tanpura, bansuri, tabla, mantra chant; awakening - a low drone with a second voice stirring beneath, a distant call, slow breath, mist lifting in the dark; 52 BPM, deep modal; ritual and sacred, atmospheric, high fidelity.
vedic.3: Hindustani sacred raga devotional; instruments: sitar, tanpura, bansuri, tabla, mantra chant; deep stillness - a slow consonant flow, voices settling into accord, grounded meditative peace, heaven-on-earth calm; 56 BPM, modal Dorian, warm and deep; ritual and sacred, atmospheric, high fidelity.
vedic.4: Hindustani sacred raga devotional; instruments: sitar, tanpura, bansuri, tabla, mantra chant; radiance - overtone choir and singing bowls in vast reverb, weightless luminous space, slow shimmer; 60 BPM, glowing modal; ritual and sacred, atmospheric, high fidelity.
vedic.5: Hindustani sacred raga devotional; instruments: sitar, tanpura, bansuri, tabla, mantra chant; vast solemn rise - deep drums and choir swelling like a slow tide, immense and grave, unhurried grandeur; 64 BPM, minor modal grandeur; ritual and sacred, atmospheric, high fidelity.
vedic.6: Hindustani sacred raga devotional; instruments: sitar, tanpura, bansuri, tabla, mantra chant; cosmic apotheosis - an infinite oceanic choir over a deep sub-bass drone, transcendent and boundless, slow waves of light dissolving into the cosmos; 70 BPM, vast modal, transcendent; ritual and sacred, atmospheric, high fidelity.
